content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Steady Vision: Web Designer Massachusetts Adobe Creative Suite, Analytics, CMS Development, Architect, Architecture, Blog Writing, Analytics Tools, Editing, Audio Editing, and Brand Identity Design Front-End Programming Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5856/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Boston, Massachusetts, United States <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://steadyvision.com">http://steadyvision.com</a> </p> <strong>Description</strong><br><p>We are digital marketing agency seeking a UI/UX designer who exhibits strong attention to detail and thrives in a dynamic environment. We’re looking for someone who is passionate about what they do and enjoys working with a small team to create meaningful digital experiences.</p><p><br></p><p><strong>You’re A Fit If…</strong></p><ul> <li>You embrace change and are eager to learn and grow.</li> <li>You are organized and a good manager of time.</li> <li>You think and act creatively to solve problems.</li> <li>You are a good communicator and collaborator.</li> <li>You are willing to go the extra mile.</li> </ul><p><br></p> <p><strong>What You’ll Be Doing…</strong></p><p>Activities primarily focus on designing visual frameworks and responsive user interfaces. This covers all areas of digital and interactive design ranging from low fidelity wireframes to full scale visual systems and everything in between.<br></p><p><br></p><br><br><strong>Requirements</strong><br><p><strong>You Must...</strong></p><ul> <li>Be a designer of everything digital (websites, email marketing, social media, etc.)</li> <li>Believe content and users inform design and interaction.</li> <li>Understand the interplay of design and development and have an appreciation for user experience.</li> <li>Have a working knowledge of responsive design principles.</li> <li>Work with Adobe Creative suite.</li> </ul><p><strong>It Would Be Nice If You Have...</strong></p><ul> <li>Experience with, or exposure to, HTML and CSS.</li> <li>Been directly involved in designing mobile and/or responsive websites.</li> <li>Exposure to open source based CMS (e.g. Drupal, ExpressionEngine, Joomla, WordPress).</li> <li>Experience with any of the following systems: HubSpot, Magento, Shopify, SquareSpace.</li> <li>Familiarity with customizing social media channels.</li> <li>Professional certifications and/or educational degrees.</li> </ul><p><br></p><br><br><strong>Benefits</strong><br><ul> <li>Small team in an entrepreneurial environment (be heard and have an impact).</li> <li>Scheduling flexibility and remote working opportunities.</li> <li>Company sponsored learning opportunities (e.g. resources, conferences, etc.).</li> <li>Casual attire, team lunches, group outings, free coffee (always!) and beer (occasionally!).</li> <li>Employee benefits (health/dental/life/disability insurance, 529 college fund &amp; 401K options).</li> </ul> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/steady-vision-web-designer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/steady-vision-web-designer</a></p> Thu, 16 Jul 2026 21:08:09 +0000 Sat, 15 Aug 2026 21:08:09 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/steady-vision-web-designer https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/steady-vision-web-designer SilverTech: Account Director New Hampshire CRM, CRM Systems, and CRM Integration Front-End Programming Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5857/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Bedford, NH <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://silvertech.com">http://silvertech.com</a> </p> <div class="job-preview-details"> <div class="vertical-padding"> <div>Full-time</div> </div> <div class="job-listing-header">Description</div> <div><p>We’re looking for a strategic, relationship-driven Account Director to lead and grow some of SilverTech’s most important client partnerships. In this role, you’ll own the full client lifecycle for a portfolio of high-value accounts, acting as a trusted advisor while helping clients envision, plan, and execute long-term digital growth.</p><p><br></p><p>You’ll work closely with client stakeholders and internal delivery teams to uncover opportunities, solve business challenges, and align SilverTech’s services to client goals. This is a highly visible role that blends strategy, client advocacy, and collaboration across sales, delivery, and leadership.</p><p>&nbsp;</p><p><strong>Location Flexibility</strong></p><p>This role offers flexibility based on candidate location and business needs, with the option to work hybrid from our Bedford, NH office or fully remote within the U.S.&nbsp;Occasional travel may be required.&nbsp;</p><p><br></p><p><strong>What You'll Do</strong></p><ul><li>Manage a portfolio of 10 - 12 high-value client accounts</li><li>Build strong, trusted relationships with client stakeholders at all levels</li><li>Lead Quarterly Business Reviews (QBRs) to discuss goals, performance, risks, and future opportunities</li><li>Develop and present strategic and tactical account plans that align client needs with SilverTech’s service offerings</li><li>Partner with clients to define long-term, multi-year visions for platform growth and evolution</li><li>Identify client pain points and opportunities, translating them into actionable solutions</li><li>Collaborate with delivery teams to define project scope, goals, assumptions, and deliverables</li><li>Coordinate estimates and proposals with internal teams and client stakeholders</li><li>Partner with Sales and the VP of Client Services to position proposals, value, and execution priorities</li><li>Serve as the client advocate internally to ensure work meets expectations for scope, timeline, and budget</li><li>Manage and communicate scope documentation and statements of work</li><li>Stay informed on industry trends, emerging technologies, and best practices relevant to client needs</li><li>Maintain accurate reporting and account documentation using Salesforce and other internal tools</li><li>Represent SilverTech with professionalism, responsiveness, and a strong client-first mindset</li></ul><p><strong>Benefits</strong></p><ul><li>Strong compensation package</li><li>Competitive health packages</li><li>401k + company match</li><li>Flexible schedules</li><li>Hybrid workweek</li><li>Unlimited PTO after 5 years</li><li>Your birthday off</li><li>Regular learn
